title: Woodland Views
description: 🕯️ Modpack centred around the Woodlands:Extra mod
body: This is a modpack centred around the Woodlands:Extra mod with some basic client-sided mods/resource packs for some polish, plus Bliss Shaders and Default PBR for some graphics. If you don't want to use shaders, the shaderless graphics are also improved with Simple Fog Control.
